name: the allowlist drift gate exits red when a registry gains a URL whose domain the committed allowlist does not yet carry
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r55-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/standards && cat > $OUT/standards/sources.yaml <<'YAML'
sources:
- id: first-src
  url: "https://first.example/docs/"
  fetcher: html-anchor.sh
YAML
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/registry-domains.sh" --root $OUT >/dev/null 2>&1 && cat >> $OUT/standards/sources.yaml <<'YAML'
- id: second-src
  url: "https://second.example/docs/"
  fetcher: html-anchor.sh
YAML
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/registry-domains.sh" --root $OUT --check >/dev/null 2>$OUT/check.err; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'drift=DRIFT' $OUT/check.err && grep -q 'second.example' $OUT/check.err && echo drift-gate-red-on-uncleared-domain 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
